Wallet: ...   

Welcome to Elephant Money TRUNK

CLAIM

...

TRUNK

...

TRUMPET

Elephant Money TRUNK is a cross-chain deflationary utility token of the Elephant Money protocol that is used as collateral in various DeFi ecosystems. Elephant Money Trumpet is a store of value backed by TRUNK that only goes up in value. Trumpet has zero transfer or dev fees, a low 5% fee is charged on minting and redemption. EMT grows in value linearly and is fully backed by the TRUNK deposited with zero reliance on third party liquidity. Bridge TRUNK to Solana and borrow USDC to maximize your gains.

STAKE ON TRUMPET
  • SOLANA
  • BNB CHAIN
  • TRUMPET STAKING

- A store of value backed by TRUNK that only goes up in value
- Zero transfer or dev fees
- Pay a low 5% fee on mint and redeem to fund the internal treasury
- No pump and dump is possible and single sided liquidity is locked in the contract
- 100% immutable with zero administrative functions
- Extra transactional volume is generated by the growing Elephant Treasury

Mini Guide

Elephant Money Trumpet is a store of value backed by TRUNK that only goes up in value

Locked Liquidity

Elephant Money Trumpet is backed by a built in single sided liquidity pool of TRUNK. The supply of TRUNK stored in the TRUMPET contract is always larger than the total supply of TRUMPET. This surplus is built using 5% fees on minting and redemption of TRUMPET.

 

High Yield with Zero Fees / Taxes

Elephant Money Trumpet is built for bull / bear market conditions and is designed to gracefully rise in price over time. The price is computed by dividing the balance of TRUNK backing TRUMPET divided by the total supply of TRUMPET.

 

Sleek and Responsive

ELEPHANT.MONEY is designed to work well on both desktop and mobile. A sleek dark theme keeps you in the zone, WINNING

 

A Bankteller Production

ELEPHANT.MONEY is open source and audited so you can sleep well at night. As always, built with love.

 

Open Source and Verified

Elephant Money Trumpet is 100% open source and is MIT licensed. In addition, our immutable store of value token is verfied on chain.

 

Secure and Audited

Elephant Money Trumpet has been fully audited and has passed 100% of all known security vulnerabilities in the SWC Registry.

 

Locked Liquidity

Elephant Money Trumpet is backed by a built in single sided liquidity pool of TRUNK. The supply of TRUNK stored in the TRUMPET contract is always larger than the total supply of TRUMPET. This surplus is built using 5% fees on minting and redemption of TRUMPET.

 

High Yield with Zero Fees / Taxes

Elephant Money Trumpet is built for bull / bear market conditions and is designed to gracefully rise in price over time. The price is computed by dividing the balance of TRUNK backing TRUMPET divided by the total supply of TRUMPET.

 

Sleek and Responsive

ELEPHANT.MONEY is designed to work well on both desktop and mobile. A sleek dark theme keeps you in the zone, WINNING

 

A Bankteller Production

ELEPHANT.MONEY is open source and audited so you can sleep well at night. As always, built with love.

 

Open Source and Verified

Elephant Money Trumpet is 100% open source and is MIT licensed. In addition, our immutable store of value token is verfied on chain.

 

Secure and Audited

Elephant Money Trumpet has been fully audited and has passed 100% of all known security vulnerabilities in the SWC Registry.

 

Locked Liquidity

Elephant Money Trumpet is backed by a built in single sided liquidity pool of TRUNK. The supply of TRUNK stored in the TRUMPET contract is always larger than the total supply of TRUMPET. This surplus is built using 5% fees on minting and redemption of TRUMPET.

 

High Yield with Zero Fees / Taxes

Elephant Money Trumpet is built for bull / bear market conditions and is designed to gracefully rise in price over time. The price is computed by dividing the balance of TRUNK backing TRUMPET divided by the total supply of TRUMPET.

 

Please do your own research before using this application. To the greatest extent possible the ELEPHANT.MONEY protocol has been implemented to be accessible directly on-chain without a user interface. This website and associated APIs have been provided for convenience.

Ultimately you are interacting with no other party other than the blockchain itself and are 100% responsible for your transactions. Please do your own research before interacting with any contract or asset on the blockchain. The ELEPHANT.MONEY community is a decentralized autonomous organization and is never liable for losses that happen using this user interface or the ELEPHANT.MONEY protocol.

Join the first and largest decentralized community bank on BSC.
